description: The proposed project is a new carousel enclosure in Joe W. Brown Park. The enclosure is to include a full scale, operational carousel, a concession and tickets stand (for selling prepackaged goods - no food prep), and gathering areas around the interior and exterior of the carousel enclosure. The carousel includes a roof and walls to protect from the elements, but is not an air tight enclosure. New electrical and plumbing service are to be run to the carousel enclosure. PLEASE NOTE THE PERMIT ADDRESS HAD TO BE CHANGED DURING THE COURSE OF APPROVAL. THE CURRENT ADDRESS IS 50 JOE BROWN DR

description: New construction of a gymnasium building with open parking provided below at the ground level that will front First Street. A separate campus development includes a new entry addition along Prytania Street and interior renovation of an existing lobby and auditorium. This submittal is intended for early schematic review by HDLC only at this time.

Renovation of an existing two-story residential building. Scope to include conjoining of second-floor residential units with updated finishes and general repairs. First story garage roof to be removed to create an exterior courtyard and second floor balcony. All work to be done as per plans. ** POOL requires separate permit**

description: To replace existing asbestos shingles with new North Country Natural Black Slate roof. Existing roof framed and decked with 1x8 sheeting for slate roof which was originally installed. Per customer request, to add treated 5/8" CDX plywood decking over the existing 1x sheeting before reroofing. To fabricate and install all new copper flashings, box valley and counter flashings. To install scaffolding and trash chute. To repair shutters and paint. To perform masonry repairs to the front cornice and have masons do stucco work and repaint stucco.
Renovation of a Modular Building (Classroom).
